brief: Oil prices surge past $90 amid escalating US-Iran tensions over the Strait of Hormuz, while a massive search continues after a ferry sinks off Guyana with an inaccurate passenger list. In research, studies highlight AI feedback in writing and visualization autocomplete tools.
news_summary: Oil prices cross $90 a barrel as US-Iran conflict widens, with Iran vowing to block the Strait of Hormuz; a criminal investigation launched after a Guyana ferry sank with over 100 passengers. Other top stories include extreme heat impacting India's workers, record UK CEO pay, and the birth of Vice President Vance's fourth child.
papers_summary: Research on AI feedback in education shows repeated use effects on student writing, while a new tool for visualization autocomplete aims to simplify chart design. Additional studies examine pauses in writing and the impact of ChatGPT on personal statements.

en.brief: Oil prices surge past $90 amid escalating US-Iran tensions over the Strait of Hormuz, while a massive search continues after a ferry sinks off Guyana with an inaccurate passenger list. In research, studies highlight AI feedback in writing and visualization autocomplete tools.
en.news_summary: Oil prices cross $90 a barrel as US-Iran conflict widens, with Iran vowing to block the Strait of Hormuz; a criminal investigation launched after a Guyana ferry sank with over 100 passengers. Other top stories include extreme heat impacting India's workers, record UK CEO pay, and the birth of Vice President Vance's fourth child.
en.papers_summary: Research on AI feedback in education shows repeated use effects on student writing, while a new tool for visualization autocomplete aims to simplify chart design. Additional studies examine pauses in writing and the impact of ChatGPT on personal statements.

zh.brief: 今天西班牙擊敗阿根廷奪得世界盃冠軍，俄羅斯人回歸現金交易，中國揭陽虐狗案引發全球抗議，而K-pop正悄悄滲透朝鮮。研究方面，AI反饋與寫作研究成為焦點，但無華語研究突出。
zh.news_summary: 西班牙在世界盃決賽中擊敗阿根廷，俄羅斯人因戰爭與網絡問題轉用現金，中國揭陽虐狗案激起全球動物保護聲浪，K-pop突破朝鮮封鎖影響脫北者。歐洲熱浪則推動中國空調出口。
zh.papers_summary: 本期無華語研究論文，但英文研究探討了AI反饋在寫作中的應用、可視化識別與超高速碰撞追蹤等主題。

todays_image.caption: Like the brown algae *Lobophora sp.* that forms dense mats on the ocean floor, mourners and speakers gathered closely, their collective presence carrying the weight of a deeply wounding attack and a life remembered.
todays_image.title: Lobophora sp.
